sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3051" key="a)kausto/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκαυστ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n3051.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make fireproof</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.166B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.Alch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.166B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
